General.Name: FORTEC Elektronik AG
General.Description: FORTEC Elektronik AG, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells components and systems in the areas of display and embedded computer technology, and power supplies in Germany and internationally. It operates in two segments, Data Visualisation and Power Supplies. The company offers standard kits; support services in the area of hardware and software for the sale of standard devices; and product solutions with access to TFT controller, as well as optical bonding technology. It also provides power supplies and DC/DC convertors. The company serves rail traffic and signal technology, medtech and communication technology, automation and robotics, medicine, measurement and control technology, and security technology markets. FORTEC Elektronik AG was founded in 1984 and is based in Germering, Germany.
